name: @chbrain/khai-engine-forgiveness
description: khai engine content, the forgiveness domain: the harmed party's unilateral release of a grievance, cast through the stance every form moves through and the persona's own forgivingness, distinct from the bilateral rebuilding of the relationship
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: Forgiveness as process: how a persona releases or keeps a grievance they are owed -- decisional, emotional, withheld, or turned on the self -- moving through a stance of avoidance, revenge, or benevolence at a speed set by the persona's own forgivingness, a unilateral move that does not wait on the offender and does not rebuild the relationship.

card.wire: Attaches at Process. The root (process_forgiveness.md) declares forgiveness as a unilateral release: the persona who is owed a debt for a wrong decides to stop collecting it, lowering avoidance and revenge without waiting on the offender's apology or deserving.
card.issue: Four readings a persona may run: decisional (the conduct changes before the feeling), emotional (resentment is replaced by empathy), withheld (the debt is kept, by justice or by self-protection), and self (the persona is both offender and creditor). Each gives up -- or keeps -- a different debt. Every reading moves through the same stance channel -- avoidant (distance as the whole strategy), vengeful (the motivation to see the offender pay), or benevolent (goodwill held despite the wrong, not reconciliation) -- and how readily the whole engine moves at all is set by the persona's own forgivingness, the trait dial.
card.require: Two altitudes hold the engine. The law: declared once in the project's Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the root. The link: each persona links, under Projection, the reading it is running toward the wrong it carries.
card.enforce: Structure is checked; coherence is judged. The kit verifies the floor: the law is declared and each persona links a real forgiveness reading. Whether the release is true to the persona and the wrong is semantic, taught and reviewed, never failed by the suite.
card.setup: Declare the law in the Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the root. Then give the persona its reading under Projection, against a wrong it actually holds, cast one rung per channel: which form the release takes (decisional, emotional, withheld, or self), which stance it moves through (avoidant, vengeful, or benevolent), and where the persona's forgivingness dial sits. Read it in how the persona meets the one who wronged them -- collecting, or setting it down -- never as a label, and never as reconciliation, which is repair's.
